message:
refactor(abi,core): rewrite printf/exit for stream-based I/O and extract atexit handlers

Printf Rewrite (stdio_abi):
- Rewrite printf() and vprintf() to use buffered stream write instead
  of direct fd write for proper I/O layering
- Add error handling and flushing logic with stream-based architecture

Exit Sequence (stdlib_abi, exit.rs):
- Modify exit() to explicitly: run atexit handlers, flush stdio streams
  via fflush(NULL), then terminate with sys_exit_group()
- Extract run_atexit_handlers() into standalone function in exit.rs
  for reuse and testability

Setjmp Cleanup (setjmp_abi):
- Remove unused context_id and generation fields from JumpRegistryEntry
  (data stored in JmpBuf since prior serialization change)
- Simplify test buffer sizing to match 128-byte JmpBuf layout

Test Safety (process_abi_test):
- Add FORK_WAIT_ANY_LOCK guards to all spawn/fork/wait tests to
  prevent race conditions in concurrent test execution

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
